creator: espen.jervidalo@gmail.com
text:
Hi, after upgrading my APU2 based router from 13.2-RELEASE to 14.0-RELEASE I'm experiencing sudden freezes:
Not reachable by ping or any other network services.

Never had any such issues before the upgrade, it was running rock solid.

I've enabled dumpdev=AUTO but nothing shows up under /var/crash.

The router is running on this board:
https://pcengines.ch/apu6b4.htm

Services:
- firewall (pf)
- wireguard
- unbound
- ntpd
- igmpproxy

Thanks for any pointers!

Espen
